name: Microwave Cranberry Orange Relish
recipeIngredient: 1 medium unpeeled apple, cored and chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Serve in sandwiches or with roast chicken, ham, turkey.
2. Process cranberries, orange, and apple until finely chopped in a food processor or blender container.
3. Place the mixture in a shallow microwavable casserole dish.
4. Stir in water, sugar, ginger, and nutmeg.
5. Microwave on High for 3 to 4 minutes, stirring occasionally.
6. Reduce power to medium (50%) and microwave for an additional 2-3 minutes.
7. Cool slightly before serving.
8. Cover and refrigerate up to 2 weeks.
9. Makes 2 1/4 cups.
10. Preparation time: 10 minutes. Serving size: 1/4 cup (45 calories, 12g carbohydrate, 0g protein, 0g fat, 2g fiber). 1 serving provides 1 Fruits & vegetables choice. 1 tablespoon serving (11 calories, 3g carbohydrate, 1g fiber).
